svg.title: ESP32 with dual CD4067 multiplexers driving 32 sectors and 8 rings, with R_ref divider on SIGNAL bus
svg.desc: Schematic showing ESP32 controlling two CD4067 16:1 multiplexers via shared address lines, independent active-low enables, eight ring GPIOs driving sensor rings directly, and a common SIGNAL output bus with R_ref pull-down and 100nF filter capacitor feeding ADC_IN.
